MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-18-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for Settlement Conference. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Loretta Najera. Susan Parkinson, Esq. appeared for Plaintiff, Mary Jane Galibso and there being no appearance by the defendant, the matter is ordered off the settlement conference calendar, request for jury trial is stricken and the trial date is confirmed.
